displayName: Suspicious PowerShell Execution - Obfuscation or Download Cradle
description: Detects PowerShell commands commonly associated with malicious activity including encoded commands, download cradles, AMSI bypass attempts, and execution policy bypass. Monitors Windows Security Event ID 4104 (Script Block Logging).
query:
// Requires PowerShell Script Block Logging (Event ID 4104)
// Enable via GPO: Computer Config > Admin Templates > Windows Components > PowerShell
let suspiciousTerms = dynamic([
    // Download cradles
    "DownloadString",
    "DownloadFile",
    "Invoke-WebRequest",
    "iwr",
    "wget",
    "curl",
    "Net.WebClient",
    // Obfuscation / encoding
    "-EncodedCommand",
    "-enc",
    "-ec",
    "[Convert]::FromBase64String",
    "FromBase64String",
    // Execution bypass
    "-ExecutionPolicy Bypass",
    "-ep bypass",
    "Set-ExecutionPolicy",
    // Code injection / reflection
    "Invoke-Expression",
    "IEX(",
    "IEX (",
    "[Reflection.Assembly]::Load",
    "[System.Reflection.Assembly]::Load",
    // AMSI bypass
    "AmsiUtils",
    "amsiInitFailed",
    "amsiContext",
    // Credential dumping
    "sekurlsa",
    "mimikatz",
    "Invoke-Mimikatz",
    "Get-GPPPassword",
    // Persistence
    "New-ScheduledTask",
    "schtasks",
    "New-ItemProperty.*Run"
]);
Event
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| where Source == "Microsoft-Windows-PowerShell"
| where EventID == 4104
| extend ScriptBlock = tostring(EventData)
| where ScriptBlock has_any (suspiciousTerms)
// Filter out known-good admin scripts (tune per environment)
| where ScriptBlock !has "WindowsDefender"
| where ScriptBlock !has "Microsoft.PowerShell.Management"
| extend
    MatchedTerm = extract(strcat("(", strcat_array(suspiciousTerms, "|"), ")"), 1, ScriptBlock),
    Computer    = Computer,
    EventTime   = TimeGenerated
// Extract account from EventData if available
| extend Account = extract(@'SubjectUserName">(.*?)<', 1, tostring(ParameterXml))
| project
    TimeGenerated = EventTime,
    Computer,
    Account,
    MatchedTerm,
    ScriptBlockPreview = substring(ScriptBlock, 0, 500)
| sort by TimeGenerated desc

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: Suspicious PowerShell execution detected on {{Computer}}. Matched indicator: {{MatchedTerm}}. Script preview: {{ScriptBlockPreview}}
